title: pleurisanthes howardii
intro: Pleurisanthes howardii, also known as Howard's pleurisanthes, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Pleurisanthes howardii is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, making it beneficial for various health issues such as skin irritations, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
